channel.title: Developer Career Track on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Career Track on simeononsecurity

item.title: Growing as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer career growth" , "junior to senior developer" , "open source contributions" , "system design" , "software engineering advancement" , "developer career track"
item.description: How to advance from junior to senior developer, choose your technical track, contribute to open source, and develop system design skills.
